mapper.select: select item_code, item_name, item_type_code, unit_code, spec, use_yn, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by from mst_item where item_code = #{itemCode}
mapper.insert: insert into mst_item ( item_code, item_name, item_type_code, unit_code, spec, use_yn, created_by ) values ( #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{itemTypeCode}, #{unitCode}, #{spec}, #{useYn}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: update mst_item set item_name = #{itemName}, item_type_code = #{itemTypeCode}, unit_code = #{unitCode}, spec = #{spec}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where item_code = #{itemCode}
